summary: Choi Yoon, also known as the Alley Academy student, engages in a high-stakes ranked match against the leader of the Black Skull guild, a villain from his past. Despite his opponent's attempts to calculate and counter his signature Ground Counter skill, Choi Yoon surprises him by revealing a hidden Sky Counter ability. Meanwhile, professional gamers are forced to act as 'drivers' to help others rank up, leading to frustration as they encounter Choi Yoon in the arena.
key_moments: Choi Yoon faces the leader of the Black Skull guild in a ranked match.
The opponent attempts to exploit the cooldown of the Ground Counter, but is caught off guard by the reveal of the Sky Counter.
Pro gamers from the Big Stars team express their frustration while being forced to act as drivers to help players climb ranks.
characters_present: Leader of the Black Skull Guild (Sharon)
